response.original_title: The Last Lecture by Randy Pausch
response.overview: This lecture spawned a national bestselling book and inspired millions to believe in the power of achieving their childhood dreams. Prof. Randy Pausch lost his cancer battle in 2008; however, his legacy lives on through The Last Lecture.
response.tagline: This lecture spawned a national bestselling book and inspired millions to believe in the power of achieving their childhood dreams. Prof. Randy Pausch lost his cancer battle in 2008; however, his legacy lives on through The Last Lecture.
response.title: The Last Lecture by Randy Pausch
